name: PMC Golf Academy
about: PMC Golf Academy is a training facility located at Stonewall Golf Club in Gainesville, VA, offering comprehensive golf instruction for adults, juniors, and women. The academy utilizes advanced technology including Trackman 4 radar and video analysis to provide data-driven coaching for all skill levels, from beginners to advanced players. Lessons are available in private, semi-private, and group formats, with an emphasis on enjoying the game in a relaxed learning environment.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced Trackman 4 technology for precise shot analysis
Video analysis capabilities for detailed swing feedback
Flexible lesson packages tailored to all skill levels
Positive, energetic instruction focused on enjoyment

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium launch monitor with radar technology

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Golf clubs are provided for junior camps and classes for those who do not own their own. Adults are encouraged to bring their own clubs for lessons.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No external food or drink service is mentioned. The facility does not appear to have on-site food or beverage service.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole simulation take?
faq.answer: Exact time for 18 holes is not specified, but typical simulator sessions range from 2-3 hours depending on group size and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, PMC Golf Academy offers dedicated junior programs, camps, and classes for ages 5-16, with age-group appropriate instruction and provided equipment.
